summary: Good‑quality audience recording with a slightly hollow hall sound but solid low end and balanced instruments; the show is praised as a standard, enjoyable performance.
review: Both reviewers enjoyed this Mason Hall show, noting that the new FLAC release sounds much better than the old cassette copy despite a bit of hollowness from the venue’s acoustics. The performance itself is described as a solid, standard set that fans will appreciate.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive reviews (4 and 5 stars) highlight an improved recording with minor acoustic quirks and a generally enjoyable, standard show.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Improved over previous cassette copy; hall acoustics make it sound a bit hollow, but low end is nice and instrument balance is solid.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Standard set list; no specific comments on pacing or transitions.
